acceptance_criteria.text: Active pattern card can create a new pending version proposal without deploy.
proof: create_industry_pattern_version_proposal creates pending_review proposals from active versions.
Telegram detail-card button ip_nv:<version_id> exposes this to superadmin.

acceptance_criteria.text: Active pattern card shows rollback candidates/other versions.
proof: Telegram detail card renders rollback candidates and Rollback N buttons.

acceptance_criteria.text: Rollback can activate a selected previous version and deactivate the current context version through Telegram HITL.
proof: rollback_industry_pattern_version activates target version and disables current context version only.
Telegram callback ip_rb:<target_version_id> is guarded by superadmin check.

acceptance_criteria.text: Rollback and new-version actions are logged in industry_pattern_decisions.
proof: Rollback action logs rollback_activate with target/source metadata.

acceptance_criteria.text: Optimizer continues to read active patterns from DB; no code deploy is needed for future version changes.
proof: Version/rollback operations change DB status and disabled_at only; optimizer remains DB-backed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Relevant tests and production smoke checks pass.
proof: Production AST check, app/worker restart, Telegram bot restart, HTTP smoke, and logs passed.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
server: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app python -B -c '<AST syntax check>'
server: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose logs --since 2m app worker --tail=120
known_gaps: No browser screenshot; this stage is Telegram/backend HITL only.
